message:
fix(core): cache identity resolution, use binary search for name validation, fix sqlite path edge case

- Add 5s TTL OnceLock cache for resolve_project_identity to avoid
  repeated git subprocess calls on the same path
- Replace HashMap-based adjective/noun lookups with sorted Vec +
  binary_search for lower memory and faster validation
- Handle bare "/" as empty in sqlite_file_path_from_database_url

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
